title: Strengthening Golems│強化傀儡
description: You can repair snow golems using snowballs, just like you can repair iron golems.│你可以用雪球修復雪傀儡，就像修復鐵傀儡一樣。
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components).│該資料包需要伺服器端模組[物品組件](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components)。 ⚠️**
# Function│功能
- Using a snowball on a snow golem with less than 100% health will restore 1 health.│對生命值未達100%的雪傀儡使用雪球可以使其回復1生命。
- You can use a snow block on a snow golem, which increases its maximum health by 1. You can use a snow block on a snow golem up to 4 times.│你可以對雪傀儡使用雪塊，這將會提升雪傀儡1點最大生命值。你最多能在一個雪傀儡身上使用4次雪塊。
- You can use iron blocks on an iron golem, which will increase the iron golem's maximum health by 1. You can use iron blocks on an iron golem up to 4 times.│你可以對鐵傀儡使用鐵塊，這將會提升鐵傀儡1點最大生命值。你最多能在一個鐵傀儡身上使用4次鐵塊。
# Usage example video│使用示例影片
